name: apiprox
description: HTTP/HTTPS Proxy and Mock Server for API Testing

scripts.tauri:dev: cd src-tauri/webview && npm install && cd ../.. && npx tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run prepare:sidecar && cd src-tauri/webview && npm install && npm run build && cd ../.. && npx tauri build
scripts.prepare:sidecar: cd sidecar && npm install && npm run binary && cd .. && node scripts/prepare-sidecar-binary.cjs
